live_outcomes.note: No live outcomes matured yet. Recommendations are tracked at 1/5/20/60/120/252 trading days; metrics appear here as horizons mature. The backtest below validates the signal methodology on history now.

confidence_calibration.method: Confidence is blended toward measured base rates: 5y point-in-time priors (by horizon, conviction tier, and market-regime side; signal_lab, embargoed) shrunk toward live recommendation outcomes with prior weight n=300. Risk-off regimes also raise the buy-action score bar and cut confidence (measured hit-rate drop when the S&P is below its 200-DMA).

live_blend.note: No matured 20/60/120d outcomes yet — priors dominate.

backtest.note: In-sample methodology validation over ~2y history; no look-ahead, 10bps round-trip cost, rebalance every 21 trading days, long when signal>=55. NOT a live tradeable track record.
